name: Taco Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove wing tips and discard. Cut wings at joint.
2. Combine bread crumbs and taco seasoning mix; mix well.
3. Preheat oven to 375°F.
4. Dip each chicken piece in taco sauce, then roll in bread crumbs, coating thoroughly.
5. Place on lightly greased baking sheet.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes.
